title: Sour Chewy Syrian English Muffin Bake
description: A unique Jain-friendly dish that combines the flavors of Syria with the comfort of English muffins, perfect for a energizing breakfast or snack. This sour and chewy bake is made with a blend of spices and ingredients that will leave you wanting more.
instructions: Cut the English muffins into 1-inch cubes and place them in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together the za'atar, sumac, olive oil, lemon juice, and apple cider vinegar.
Pour the wet ingredients over the English muffin cubes and toss to coat.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley, scallions, and salt over the top and toss again to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the English muffins are toasted and the mixture is heated through.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Sour Chewy Syrian English Muffin Bake warm, garnished with additional parsley and scallions if desired.
